title: blakebab
description:
modpack for blakebab sever.

Offers compatability of sodium, create & hephaestus.
body:
modpack for blakebab official server.
MIT license.

Normal methods of playing with create and tinker's construct tend to frustratingly lead to playing on older versions like 1.18.2, and offer lower framerates. Blakebab aims to maintain compatibility between these two mods primarily, along with sodium, for better stability. A large variety of patches and libraries are needed to maintain compatibility between create and hephaestus (port of tinker's construct), and blakebab aims to remove the burden of installing these patches, which are often hard to find and require scrounging discord support servers, by providing it in one easy to use modpack.

-Contains stability mods, worldgen mods such as terralith, nullscape, incendium, along with content mods Hephaestus and create
